broken_trust_link_surface_critical.name: No trust links
broken_trust_link_surface_critical.description: Package is missing homepage, bug tracker, and repository links, leaving no external verification surface.

broken_trust_link_surface_medium.name: Missing trust links
broken_trust_link_surface_medium.description: Package is missing both homepage and bug tracker links, reducing auditability.

download_spike_critical.name: Extreme download spike versus maturity
download_spike_critical.description: Package younger than 90 days has extremely high monthly downloads, which warrants urgent review.

download_spike_high.name: Download spike versus maturity
download_spike_high.description: Very new package already has unusually high monthly downloads relative to age.

low_forks_low.name: Low fork activity
low_forks_low.description: Repository has zero forks, suggesting little downstream engagement.

low_forks_medium_old_package.name: Low fork activity on older package
low_forks_medium_old_package.description: Repository has zero forks despite the package being older than 180 days.

low_maintenance_footprint.name: Low-maintenance footprint
low_maintenance_footprint.description: Old package has stale updates, no releases, and limited commit history, indicating likely abandonment.

low_monthly_downloads_low.name: Low monthly adoption
low_monthly_downloads_low.description: Package has only twenty to one hundred monthly downloads, still a weak adoption signal.

low_monthly_downloads_medium.name: Low monthly adoption
low_monthly_downloads_medium.description: Package has fewer than twenty monthly downloads, indicating almost no ecosystem footprint.

low_owner_reputation_high.name: Low owner reputation
low_owner_reputation_high.description: Repository owner has zero followers, providing almost no public trust signal.

low_owner_reputation_low.name: Low owner reputation
low_owner_reputation_low.description: Repository owner has only four to ten followers, which is still a weak reputation signal.

low_owner_reputation_medium.name: Low owner reputation
low_owner_reputation_medium.description: Repository owner has only one to three followers, a weak public trust signal.

low_owner_track_record_low.name: Owner has modest track record
low_owner_track_record_low.description: Owner has only four to ten public repositories, still a fairly small track record.

low_owner_track_record_medium.name: Owner has little track record
low_owner_track_record_medium.description: Owner has three or fewer public repositories, indicating a limited visible history.

low_stars_low.name: Low GitHub attention
low_stars_low.description: Repository has only one to four stars, still a weak validation signal.

low_stars_medium.name: Low GitHub attention
low_stars_medium.description: Repository has zero stars, giving no external validation signal.

low_watches.name: Low watch activity
low_watches.description: Repository has zero watchers, indicating low ongoing community attention.

low_weekly_downloads_high.name: Low weekly adoption
low_weekly_downloads_high.description: Package has zero weekly downloads, implying no observed active usage.

low_weekly_downloads_low.name: Low weekly adoption
low_weekly_downloads_low.description: Package has only eleven to fifty weekly downloads, still a small active footprint.

low_weekly_downloads_medium.name: Low weekly adoption
low_weekly_downloads_medium.description: Package has only one to ten weekly downloads, indicating limited active usage.

maintainer_missing_all_identity.name: Maintainer missing all identity fields
maintainer_missing_all_identity.description: At least one maintainer record is missing both username and email.

maintainer_missing_partial_identity.name: Maintainers have partial identity data
maintainer_missing_partial_identity.description: All maintainer records are missing either username or email, reducing accountability.

missing_description.name: Missing description
missing_description.description: Package has no description, making intent and scope less transparent.

missing_github_repository_metadata.name: Missing GitHub repository metadata
missing_github_repository_metadata.description: Package has no usable GitHub repository link or no cached GitHub metadata, so provenance and maintenance signals cannot be verified.

new_owner_account_high.name: New owner account
new_owner_account_high.description: Repository owner account is less than 90 days old and may not be established.

new_owner_account_medium.name: Relatively new owner account
new_owner_account_medium.description: Repository owner account is between 90 and 365 days old and still building history.

no_license.name: No license
no_license.description: Package has no license, creating legal and maturity risk.

no_maintainer_listed.name: No maintainer listed
no_maintainer_listed.description: Package exposes no maintainer records, making accountability and recovery difficult.

no_releases.name: No releases
no_releases.description: Repository has no tagged releases, suggesting weak release hygiene.

package_repo_age_mismatch_low.name: Package-repository age mismatch
package_repo_age_mismatch_low.description: Package age differs from repository age by more than one year, which is mildly anomalous.

package_repo_age_mismatch_medium.name: Large package-repository age mismatch
package_repo_age_mismatch_medium.description: Package age differs from repository age by more than two years, which is anomalous enough to review.

single_maintainer.name: Single maintainer package
single_maintainer.description: Package is controlled by one maintainer, creating high bus-factor and account-compromise risk.

stale_package_updates_high.name: Stale package updates
stale_package_updates_high.description: Package has not been updated for more than a year.

stale_package_updates_low.name: Aging package updates
stale_package_updates_low.description: Package has not been updated for 90 to 179 days.

stale_package_updates_medium.name: Stale package updates
stale_package_updates_medium.description: Package has not been updated for 180 to 365 days.

tiny_commit_history_high.name: Tiny commit history
tiny_commit_history_high.description: Repository has three or fewer commits, suggesting minimal development history.

tiny_commit_history_low.name: Shallow commit history
tiny_commit_history_low.description: Repository has only twenty-one to fifty commits, still a modest maintenance history.

tiny_commit_history_medium.name: Limited commit history
tiny_commit_history_medium.description: Repository has only four to twenty commits, indicating low development depth.

very_new_package_high.name: Very new package
very_new_package_high.description: Package was published less than 30 days ago and has had little time for scrutiny.

very_new_package_medium.name: Relatively new package
very_new_package_medium.description: Package was published between 30 and 90 days ago and is still early in its lifecycle.

very_new_repository_high.name: Very new repository
very_new_repository_high.description: Repository is less than 30 days old and likely not battle-tested.

very_new_repository_medium.name: Relatively new repository
very_new_repository_medium.description: Repository is between 30 and 90 days old and still early in maturity.

weak_consistency_across_signals.name: Weak consistency across signals
weak_consistency_across_signals.description: Older package still has near-zero adoption, stars, forks, releases, and commits, which strongly suggests abandonment or low credibility.
